about.title: The Man Behind The Bench
about.paragraph1: Welcome to Sosa's 64bit Fix — your trusted local computer repair shop. I'm Sosa, a certified technician with years of hands-on experience reviving dead PCs, upgrading aging laptops, and making technology work for you.
about.paragraph2: I believe in transparent pricing, honest diagnostics, and treating every device like it's my own. Whether you spilled coffee on your laptop, got hit with ransomware, or just need a tune-up — I'll get you back up and running.
contact.title: Let's Fix It
contact.subtitle: Have a broken device? Drop me a message and I'll get back to you ASAP.
contact.sent: Thanks! I'll get back to you soon.
footer.tagline: Fixing your tech, one bit at a time.
